tokens.basis: Pure infrastructure rung — no vehicle dynamics changes. Single self-correction round on a perturbation test (Rapier was so deterministic that 1e-30 tolerance still passed; rewrote the test to use an actual fDrive perturbation). One TypeScript fix (replaced findLast with manual scan; ES2023 lib not enabled). At ~10k tokens/% (R0+R1 baseline rate), R8 ≈ 110k. Session pre-R8 was at ~96%; post-R8 likely near limit.

caveats: Same agent wrote and implemented the R8 spec; not a clean cross-tool comparison.

Rapier is so deterministic across two independent worlds in the same process that the default 1e-7/1e-5 tolerances are luxury — actual replay divergence is exactly 0 (bit-identical). The tolerances are still meaningful for cross-build/cross-machine replay.
